'''Miyazaki Shrine''' (宮崎神社, pronounced *Miyazaki Jinja*) refers to various Shinto shrines across Japan.
* {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine|en|宮崎神宮}} - Formerly known as Miyazaki Jingu. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Rikuzentakata)|en|宮崎神社 (陸前高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Rikuzentakata|en|陸前高田市}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|en|岩手県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Okazaki)|en|宮崎神社 (岡崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki|en|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|愛知県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akitakata)|en|宮崎神社 (安芸高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akitakata|en|安芸高田市}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|広島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akune)|en|宮崎神社 (阿久根市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akune|en|阿久根市}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|en|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Kagoshima)|en|宮崎神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima|en|鹿児島市}}, Kagoshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Higashihiroshima)|en|宮崎神社 (東広島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Higashihiroshima|en|東広島市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Daisen)|en|宮崎神社 (大栄町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daisen|en|大栄町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|鳥取県}}.
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[ja:宮崎神社]]

* {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine|ja|宮崎神宮}} - Formerly known as Miyazaki Jingu. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Rikuzentakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (陸前高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Rikuzentakata|ja|陸前高田市}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|ja|岩手県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|宮崎神社 (岡崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akitakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (安芸高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akitakata|ja|安芸高田市}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akune)|ja|宮崎神社 (阿久根市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akune|ja|阿久根市}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima|ja|鹿児島市}}, Kagoshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Higashihiroshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (東広島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Higashihiroshima|ja|東広島市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Daisen)|ja|宮崎神社 (大栄町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daisen|ja|大栄町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}.

* {{ill|Miyazaki Jingū|ja|宮崎神宮}} - Formerly known as Miyazaki Jingu. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Rikuzentakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (陸前高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Rikuzentakata|ja|陸前高田市}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|ja|岩手県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|宮崎神社 (岡崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akitakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (安芸高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akitakata|ja|安芸高田市}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akune)|ja|宮崎神社 (阿久根市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akune|ja|阿久根市}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima|ja|鹿児島市}}, Kagoshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Higashihiroshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (東広島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Higashihiroshima|ja|東広島市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Daisen)|ja|宮崎神社 (大栄町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daisen|ja|大栄町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}.

* {{ill|Miyazaki Jingū|ja|宮崎神宮}} - Formerly known as Miyazaki Jingu. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Rikuzentakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (陸前高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Rikuzentakata|ja|陸前高田市}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|ja|岩手県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|宮崎神社 (岡崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akitakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (安芸高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akitakata|ja|安芸高田市}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akune)|ja|宮崎神社 (阿久根市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akune|ja|阿久根市}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima|ja|鹿児島市}}, Kagoshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Higashihiroshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (東広島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Higashihiroshima|ja|東広島市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Daisen)|ja|宮崎神社 (大栄町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daisen|ja|大栄町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}.

'''Miyazaki Shrine''' (宮崎神社, pronounced *Miyazaki Jinja*) refers to various Shinto shrines across Japan.
* {{ill|Miyazaki Jingū|ja|宮崎神宮}} - Formerly known as Miyazaki Jingu. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Rikuzentakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (陸前高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Rikuzentakata|ja|陸前高田市}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|ja|岩手県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|宮崎神社 (岡崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akitakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (安芸高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akitakata|ja|安芸高田市}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akune)|ja|宮崎神社 (阿久根市)}} - Located in {{ill|Akune|ja|阿久根市}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima|ja|鹿児島市}}, Kagoshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Higashihiroshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (東広島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Higashihiroshima|ja|東広島市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Daisen)|ja|宮崎神社 (大栄町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daisen|ja|大栄町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}.

* {{ill|Miyazaki Jingū|ja|宮崎神宮|12=draft}} - Formerly known as Miyazaki Jingu. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Rikuzentakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (陸前高田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Rikuzentakata|ja|陸前高田市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|ja|岩手県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|宮崎神社 (岡崎市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|ja|愛知県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akitakata)|ja|宮崎神社 (安芸高田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Akitakata|ja|安芸高田市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Akune)|ja|宮崎神社 (阿久根市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Akune|ja|阿久根市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (鹿児島市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima|ja|鹿児島市|12=draft}}, Kagoshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Higashihiroshima)|ja|宮崎神社 (東広島市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Higashihiroshima|ja|東広島市|12=draft}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Miyazaki Shrine (Daisen)|ja|宮崎神社 (大栄町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Daisen|ja|大栄町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}.
